data.title: 国际服阿比多斯贺图

data.body:
That wraps up the Abydos student's intros!
Here's a new wallpaper to celebrate!
Why not set the Countermeasures Council as your device's background?
Heehee. And don't forget to retweet if you like what you see, Sensei!
#BlueArchive

Here's the HD ver.!
https://nexon.link/9ID![0OzmbZPKBDEyIEoL7N9DyUaugbHAQkcg.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/0OzmbZPKBDEyIEoL7N9DyUaugbHAQkcg.jpg)
